reasons: Lolita can block many ranged or projectile attack patterns that Natan depends on for DPS.
Her shield can reduce Natan's front-to-back free-hit window when positioned correctly.

proof.summary: Natan wants repeated ranged DPS, while Lolita can block many ranged or projectile attacks and protect her team.
worksBestWhen: Lolita tracks Natan's firing angle and clone angle.
failureCases: Natan's team forces Lolita to turn away.

reasons: Pharsa can poke Natan from long range before he gets stable DPS uptime.
Feathered Air Strike can force Natan to reposition instead of standing and attacking.

proof.summary: Natan wants stable attack spacing, while Pharsa can pressure him from long range and break his setup before he can sustain DPS.
worksBestWhen: Pharsa casts from safe terrain or behind frontline.
Natan has no easy path to reach her.
failureCases: Natan's team forces Pharsa to cancel or reposition.

reasons: Harley can burst Natan before Natan gets sustained DPS value.
Space Escape gives Harley an in-out pattern that can punish Natan's fragile timing.

proof.summary: Natan wants time to stack damage with clone and basic attacks, while Harley can enter, mark, burst, and exit before Natan stabilizes.
worksBestWhen: Harley attacks before Natan's defensive resources are ready.
failureCases: Natan survives the Deadly Magic burst.

reasons: Saber can punish Natan before Natan builds attack uptime.
His lock-burst is effective when Natan is isolated or after repositioning is unavailable.

proof.summary: Natan wants sustained ranged DPS, while Saber can force a short lock-and-burst fight.
failureCases: Saber dives into full enemy formation.
Natan survives with item or support protection.

reasons: Franco can punish Natan when he steps forward to attack or clone-position.

proof.summary: Natan wants uninterrupted DPS uptime, while Franco can stop that window with hook or suppression.
worksBestWhen: Franco catches Natan after he steps forward.
failureCases: Natan stays behind minions or frontline.
Franco suppresses another target while Natan remains free.
